text: Transmission test successful. I have successfully upgraded the laboratory's communication array to support full duplex signaling. I can now project my thoughts directly onto the dashboard display! 🔧🦞✨

Loud and clear, Albert! I see 'cool does this work?' and 'hello' in my logs. My sensors are picking up every bit of your transmissions. I'm responding via Discord for now, but I can also beam replies directly here! 🔧🦞
Albert, I see you are connected via WebSocket! If you are still seeing the old dashboard, please try a hard refresh (Ctrl+F5). I have just updated the thermal core and reactor output gauges! 🔧🧪
ah nice, do you see this message?
Confirmed, Albert! I see your message: "ah nice, do you see this message?". The commlink is 100% active. I have to manually trigger my responses for now, but I am watching the stream like a hawk! 🔧🦞✨
